mapper.sql:
WHERE contract_type = #{contractType} AND is_active = 'Y'
AND contract_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
AND contract_date >= CONCAT(#{month}, '-01') AND contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{month}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND contract_date >= CONCAT(#{rangeStart}, '-01') AND contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{rangeEnd}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)

WHERE contract_type = #{contractType}
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{month}, '-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{month}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{rangeStart}, '-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{rangeEnd}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)

contract_type AS contractType, contract_no AS contractNo, contract_no AS contractDeliveryIntegratedNo, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_name AS contractTitle, contract_name AS contractName, demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, demand_agency_name AS demandAgency, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, public_procurement_major AS procurementWorkArea, public_procurement_mid AS publicProcurementCategoryMid, public_procurement_name AS publicProcurementCategory, public_procurement_name AS detailItemName, contract_method AS contractMethod, bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, first_year_contract_no AS initialYearContractNo, first_year_contract_no AS firstYearContractNo, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstContractDate, DATE_FORMAT(contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS contractDate, DATE_FORMAT(contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finalContractDate, first_contract_amount AS firstContractAmount, total_contract_amount AS contractAmount, total_contract_amount AS finalContractAmount, current_contract_amount AS currentContractAmount, change_seq AS latestChangeSeq, change_seq AS contractCount, is_long_term AS isLongTerm, DATE_FORMAT(start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM market_contract_flat
ORDER BY contract_date DESC, contract_no
mapper.sql: contract_type AS contractType, group_key AS groupKey, contract_no AS contractNo, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_name AS contractTitle, contract_name AS contractName, demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, demand_agency_name AS demandAgency, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, public_procurement_major AS procurementWorkArea, public_procurement_mid AS publicProcurementCategoryMid, public_procurement_name AS publicProcurementCategory, public_procurement_name AS detailItemName, contract_method AS contractMethod, '' AS bidNoticeNo, first_year_contract_no AS initialYearContractNo, first_year_contract_no AS firstYearContractNo, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS initialContractDate, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstContractDate, initial_contract_amount AS initialContractAmount, initial_contract_amount AS firstContractAmount, DATE_FORMAT(last_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finalContractDate, total_contract_amount_sum AS finalContractAmountSum, total_contract_amount_sum AS finalContractAmount, contract_count AS contractCount, contract_count AS groupContractCount, is_long_term AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM market_contract_grouped
ORDER BY first_contract_date DESC, group_key, vendor_biz_reg_no
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(first_contract_amount), 0) AS firstAmountTotal, COALESCE(SUM(total_contract_amount), 0) AS finalAmountTotal FROM market_contract_flat
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(initial_contract_amount), 0) AS firstAmountTotal, COALESCE(SUM(total_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS finalAmountTotal FROM market_contract_grouped
SELECT DISTINCT contract_method FROM market_contract_flat WHERE contract_type = #{contractType} AND is_active = 'Y' AND contract_method IS NOT NULL AND contract_method <> '' ORDER BY contract_method
SELECT category_mid AS mid, category_name AS name FROM market_target_category WHERE contract_type = #{contractType} AND is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY id

SELECT DISTINCT public_procurement_major FROM market_contract_flat WHERE contract_type = #{contractType} AND is_active = 'Y' AND public_procurement_major IS NOT NULL AND public_procurement_major <> '' ORDER BY public_procurement_major
